summary: Session 1 (comprehensive review baseline and triage) complete. Recorded the three-layer baseline (pytest 2268/5/0; tsc clean; mocha 906->910 passing after repairs; Playwright CI-green on 3 OSes, local parallel flake documented) and repaired the RED master CI discovered at the set-authoring commit (cold-start goldens regenerated for the template appendix). Discharged the owed second planning-critique leg (GPT-5.4, architecture, SOUND-WITH-CHANGES) and folded its M1-M7 into spec.md. Routed six code-review bundles (sonnet + gemini-pro auto-verify) over the audit surfaces; confirmed all pinned A1-A12 findings with code evidence; hard-confirmed orchestrator.provider persistence (omit-null, all three writers; --provider optional) so the A6/S5 gate plan stands without scope growth. Applied 13 mechanical inline fixes (incl. CSP nonce CSPRNG, planImport fs guards, kickoff-prompt path quoting, runtime_mode lazy-import repair, UnicodeError sibling closure x3, realpath-based root dedup); classified 10 fold-forward items into S2-S5 (spec amended in place), refuted 4 false positives, deferred 7 with reasons. Wrote s1-review-findings.md. Verification round 1 (gpt-5-4) found one real defect in an inline fix (S077-S1-V1-001, OS-name proxy for case sensitivity); fixed via fs.realpathSync.native dedup; round 2 VERIFIED.

reason.specifics: Session 2 (tier truth chain) spans webview JavaScript state persistence and extension TypeScript helpers with regression fixtures; the routed ai-assignment analysis recommends Claude Code at high effort for the cross-file state-management work, and S1's context carries directly into the A1/A11 fixes.
